product_definition.title: Quota & Economy System
product_definition.description: A flexible quota-driven economy system for UE5.5. Tracks player-submitted items against rotating quotas, calculates value, applies profit/penalty, and drives an in-game shop and upgrade tree. Inspired by extraction and delivery-loop games.
product_definition.target_audience: Extraction, delivery, and scavenging game developers (e.g. Lethal Company-style)

core_features: UQuotaSubsystem: current quota target, deadline days, submitted value tracking
Quota rotation: generates new quota on deadline with scaling difficulty
Item value registry: DataAsset mapping item tags to base value + condition multiplier
Deposit terminal actor: players submit items, value calculated server-side
Penalty system: lose credits/health on failed quota
UShopSubsystem: rotating shop inventory, purchase validation
Upgrade tree: DataAsset-driven upgrades unlocked with credits
Multiplayer sync: all economy state server-authoritative, replicated
Economy HUD: quota progress bar, credits display, deadline counter

demo_map_requirements.test_scenario: Player picks up item, deposits at terminal, quota progress updates, shop purchase succeeds
